admin_required: ⚙️ I need the invite users via link admin permission to work properly.
admin_cache_wait: ⏳ Easy there! You can refresh the admin cache only once every 10 minutes.

auth_is_admin: 👮 The user is already an admin and can't be added as an authorized user.
auto_left: 😴 I waited, I watched, I yawned… and then I quietly left the video chat.

bl_not: ℹ️ This chat is not blacklisted.
bl_removed: ✅ This chat has been removed from the blacklist.
bl_user_notify: 🚫 You've been blacklisted from using this bot. Need help? Reach out in the support chat for more info.
dl_complete: ✅ Download completed. Processing file… ⏱️ Time elapsed: {0}s
dl_cancelling: ⏳ Hang on, cancelling the download now!

error_low_storage: ⚠️ Can't play this media! There's not enough storage space on the server — the file is too large to download. If this keeps happening, please contact support.

⏭️ Moving to the next track…

🎧 No audio source was found in this file.

error_no_file: ❌ Download failed. If this keeps happening, report it to the support chat.
error_tg_server: ⚠️ Telegram server error Telegram is having some internal issues. I'm clearing the queue and leaving the video chat for now.
error_rtmp: 📡 RTMP streaming is not supported. Please stop the RTMP stream and start a regular video chat instead.
eval_error: ⚠️ Error while executing the code snippet
gcast_usage: 📢 Reply to a message to broadcast it.
gcast_active: ⏳ A broadcast is already running. Please wait for it to finish.
gcast_stopped: ✅ Broadcasting stopped. (check log group) 📊 Sent to {0} groups and {1} users.
gcast_log: 📡 Broadcast Log User: {0} | {1} Command: {2} Use /stop_gcast to stop the broadcast.
gcast_end: ✅ Broadcast delivered to {0} groups and {1} users.
help_menu: 🤖 Tap a button below to see what I can do. Note: All commands can be used with /
help_admins: 🛠️ Admin commands: /pause: Pause the ongoing stream. /resume: Resume the paused stream. /skip: Skip the current stream. /stop: Stop the ongoing stream. /seek [duration in seconds]: Seek the ongoing stream forward. /seekback [duration in seconds]: Seek the ongoing stream backward. /vclogger [on/off]: Toggle the Voice Chat Logger. /reload: Reload the admin cache.
help_auth: 🔑 Auth commands: Authorized users can control the stream without being an admin. /auth: Add a user to the authorized users list. /unauth: Remove a user from the authorized users list.
help_autoplay: 🎶 Autoplay commands: Autoplay automatically plays the next song when the current one ends. /autoplay on: Enable smart autoplay (auto-detects genre). /autoplay off: Disable autoplay. /autoplay [genre]: Enable autoplay with a specific genre (pop, rock, lofi, kpop, etc.) Tip: You can also toggle Autoplay using the ∞ button in the player controls.
help_login: 🔐 Assistant Login: Any user can add their account as a music assistant to the bot. /login: Start the login process (Phone ➜ OTP ➜ Password). /stoplogin: Cancel an ongoing login process. Note: This allows the bot to use your account to stream music, which helps reduce flood wait limits.
help_blist: 🚫 Blacklist commands: Blacklisted chats and users cannot use the bot. /blacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Add a chat/user to the blacklist. /unblacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Remove a chat/user from the blacklist.
help_ping: 📡 Ping & basic commands: /help: Show the help menu. /ping: Check the ping and memory usage of the bot. /start: Start the bot. /sudolist: Show the list of sudo users of the bot.
help_play: 🎧 Play commands: Play music in the video chat using these commands. /play [song name / YouTube URL / reply to audio]: Play audio in the video chat. /vplay [song name / YouTube URL / reply to video]: Play a music video in the video chat. /playforce [song name / URL]: Force play audio (skips current track). /vplayforce [song name / URL]: Force play video (skips current track). Tip: You can also reply to any message containing a URL with /play to play it!
help_queue: 📜 Queue commands: /queue: Shows the currently queued tracks.
help_player: 🎛 Player commands: Control the playback in the video chat. /pause: Pause playback. /resume: Resume playback. /skip: Skip to next track. /stop: Stop and clear queue. /queue: Show current queue. Tip: Use inline buttons for quick control!
help_sudo: 👑 Sudo commands: /ac: Shows the active calls count. /activevc: Shows the list of the active calls. /broadcast [reply to message]: Broadcasts the replied message to all the chats. -nochat: Excludes groups from the broadcast. -user: Include users in the broadcast. -copy: Removes the forwarded tag from the broadcast message. Example: /broadcast -user -copy /eval: Executes the given code. /restart: Restarts the bot. /vclogger [on/off]: Toggle the Voice Chat Logger. /addsudo: Add a user to the sudo users list. /rmsudo: Remove a user from the sudo users list. /addfallback: Reply to a cookie file to add/update fallback cookie for 'Sign in' errors. /autoleave: Toggle auto-leave for current chat (keeps assistant in important groups). 📱 Session Management: /addsession [name]: Add a new assistant. /rmsession : Remove an assistant. /sessions: List all active assistants.
not_playing: 🔇 The bot isn't streaming anything in the video chat right now.
play_admin: 🛡️ Admin-only mode Only admins are allowed to play in this chat.
play_usage: 📚 Usage: /play [song name | YouTube link | reply to audio/video]
play_next:
⏭️ Hold on…

Downloading the next track from the queue.

play_seek_no_dur: ❌ Failed to get the duration of the current stream.
play_seek_min: ⏱️ Minimum seek time is 10 seconds — try a bit longer!
play_duration_limit: ⏰ Streams longer than {0} minutes are not allowed to play.
play_queue_full: 📛 The queue limit ({0}) has been reached. Please wait for some tracks to finish, then try again.
play_invite_error: ❌ Failed to invite the assistant to this chat. Reason: {0}
play_not_found: ❌ Couldn't process that query. If this keeps happening, please report it in the support chat.
play_chat_invalid: 🏙️ This bot can only be used in supergroups. To convert your group, make the chat history visible once. Leaving this chat…
play_user_invalid: 🕵️ You're an anonymous admin. Please switch back to your user account.

📂 Fetching the playlist…

Please hold on.

restarted: ♻️ Restart in progress. Don't worry, it'll only take a few seconds… maybe. 😉
start_pm: 🎶 Hey {0}, This is {1}! I'm a music player bot with awesome and useful features for your chats. Tap the Help button below for more info.
start_gp: 🎵 Hey, This is {0} A music player bot with some awesome and powerful features.
start_settings: ⚙️ {0} settings Click the buttons below to change this chat's current settings.
sudo_already: ℹ️ {0} is already a sudo user.
sudo_added: ✅ Added {0} to the sudo users list.
sudo_removed: ✅ Removed {0} from the sudo users list.
user_not_admin: 🙅‍♂️ You can't manage the video chat — you're not an admin.
user_no_perms: 🔒 You can't manage the video chat with your current permissions.
user_not_found: 🔎 I need a user ID — or just reply to the user's message.
vc_empty: 🔇 Looks like there aren't any active streams on the bot.
help_federation:
🌐 <cu><cb>Federation commands:</cb></cu>
<ci>Federations allow you to ban users across multiple groups at once.</ci>

/newfed <name> - Create a new federation.
/joinfed <fed_id> - Join your group to a federation.
/leavefed - Leave the current federation.
/delfed - Delete your federation.
/myfeds - List your federations.
/fedinfo - Show federation info.
/fedadmins - List federation admins.
/fban <user> [reason] - Ban user from federation.
/unfban <user> - Unban user from federation.
/fbanlist - List banned users.
/chatfed - Show which federation this chat belongs to.
/fedchats - List all chats in the federation.
help_locks:
🔒 <cu><cb>Locks commands:</cb></cu>
<ci>Control what members can send in the chat.</ci>

/lock <type> - Lock a specific message type.
/unlock <type> - Unlock a specific message type.
/locks - View current locks.

<cb>Types:</cb> messages, media, other, photo, video, docs, voice, audio, videonote, polls, url, group_info, useradd, pin, all
help_filters:
🔖 <cu><cb>Filters commands:</cb></cu>
<ci>Auto-reply when specific words are mentioned.</ci>

/filters - List all filters in the chat.
/filter <name> - Save a filter (reply to a message).
/stop <name> - Delete a filter.
/stopall - Delete all filters.

<cb>Supported types:</cb> Text, Animation, Photo, Document, Video, Audio, Voice, Sticker.
<cb>Note:</cb> You can use markdown and buttons in filters.
help_admin:
👮 <cu><cb>Admin commands:</cb></cu>
<ci>Basic moderation tools.</ci>

/ban [user] [reason] - Ban a user from the chat.
/unban [user] - Unban a user from the chat.

Reply to a user's message or provide username/ID.
help_afk:
💤 <cu><cb>AFK commands:</cb></cu>
<ci>Let others know you're away.</ci>

/afk [reason] - Set yourself as AFK.
/afk [reply to media] - Set AFK with media.

The bot will notify others when they mention you.
help_sangmata:
👀 <cu><cb>SangMata:</cb></cu>
<ci>Track user name/username changes.</ci>

/sangmata [on/off] - Enable/disable SangMata in the group.

When enabled, the bot will notify the chat when users change their name or username.
help_games:
🎮 <cu><cb>Games:</cb></cu>
<ci>Play fun games in the group.</ci>

/tebakgambar - Guess the image.
/tebaklontong - Guess the riddle (Lontong style).
/tebakkata - Guess the word.
/tebaktebakan - Guess the riddle.
/stopgame - Stop the current game.
help_memes: 😂 Memes: Create memes from stickers and images. /memify - Reply to a sticker/photo to add text. /mmf - Same as memify. Use ; to split top/bottom text. Example: /memify Top Text;Bottom Text
help_extras: 🛠️ Extras: Useful tools and utilities. /urban - Search Urban Dictionary. /currency - Convert currency. Example: /currency 100 USD EUR
help_ytdl:
📥 <cu><cb>Video Downloader:</cb></cu>
<ci>Download videos/audio from any URL.</ci>

/ytdl <url> - Download video (max 720p).
/ytdl <url> audio - Download audio only (MP3).

Supports 1000+ sites: YouTube, Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, etc.
<cb>Note:</cb> Admin/sudo only. 2GB file size limit.
help_autoforward:
📨 <cu><cb>Auto Forwarder:</cb></cu>
<ci>Automatically forward messages to other chats.</ci>

/addforward <dest_chat_id> - Add a destination for auto-forwarding.
/delforward <dest_chat_id> - Remove a destination.
/forwards - List current forwarding destinations.

<cb>Note:</cb> The bot must be admin in both source and destination chats.
help_quotly:
💬 <cu><cb>Quotly:</cb></cu>
<ci>Create beautiful quote stickers.</ci>

/q - Reply to a message to create a quote sticker.
/quotly - Same as /q.

The bot will generate a stylish sticker with the quoted message.
help_stickers:
🎨 <cu><cb>Stickers:</cb></cu>
<ci>Sticker pack management and utilities.</ci>

/stickerid - Get the file ID of a sticker.
/getsticker - Get the sticker as a PNG file.
/kang - Add a sticker to your pack.

Reply to a sticker to use these commands.
